name: skillfit
description: Local-first readiness checker for reusable agent skills.

scripts.smoke: node bin/skillfit.js --help && node bin/skillfit.js --version && node bin/skillfit.js fixtures/valid-skill --format markdown --out tmp/smoke.md && test -s tmp/smoke.md
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappel
